title: Large healthcare network discloses third-party data access incident
summary: Initial investigation points to compromised contractor credentials and delayed MFA enforcement.

title: New phishing toolkit targets cloud admin portals
summary: Researchers observed rapid updates to bypass common reverse proxy detections.

title: CERT warns of coordinated botnet expansion in APAC
summary: Abuse of outdated IoT routers appears to fuel DDoS-for-hire infrastructure.

title: Cloud provider publishes hardening guide after privilege bug
summary: Guidance recommends stricter short-lived credential policies and service-account isolation.

title: Ransomware affiliate leak reveals victim targeting playbook
summary: The leaked files show focus on under-monitored backup platforms and dormant service accounts.

title: Browser vendor patches zero-day in enterprise channel
summary: Administrators should fast-track updates where browser sandboxing is policy-disabled.

title: Researchers map rise in MFA fatigue attacks
summary: Push-bombing remains effective when identity telemetry and conditional access are weak.

title: EU regulator proposes stricter breach reporting windows
summary: Draft language may require near-real-time incident status updates for critical sectors.

title: Malvertising campaign abuses fake security scanner ads
summary: The campaign uses typo-squatted download portals to deliver credential stealers.

title: Open-source maintainers discuss package signing baseline
summary: Proposed defaults emphasize provenance metadata and stronger release attestations.

title: Telecom incident report highlights API gateway misconfiguration
summary: Misrouted authentication traffic exposed session tokens during a maintenance window.

title: Threat group shifts to Rust-based loaders
summary: New tooling focuses on stealthy credential access and cloud persistence.
